job_description:
# Healthcare ETL Tester- "AWS OR Databricks experience is mandatory"
Company: Dotcom Team, LLC
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/ba30753e-7aa4-47b0-80d9-af5b12c37b9f

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare ETL tester role.
- Posted 46 minutes ago.
- Same core ETL QA and SQL validation responsibilities as the related Dotcom Team role, with a stronger requirement for AWS or Databricks exposure.
- Functional fit remains good, but the cloud requirement makes it a more moderate match.
strengths: Core ETL QA, SQL validation, reconciliation, and healthcare data fit remain strong.
Resume supports Databricks and cloud tools as upskilling/exposure.
Separate active posting URL from the related Dotcom Team role.
gaps: AWS or Databricks is framed as mandatory in the title; resume support is limited and should stay conservative.
Likely more cloud-stack expectation than the strongest-fit QA roles.
notes: Valid separate posting, but score lower because of the mandatory AWS/Databricks wording. Keep tailoring factual and modest on cloud depth.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare ETL Tester | SQL QA Analyst | Data Validation

replacements.find: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building cloud and AI-ready data pipeline competencies to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data stacks.
replacements.replace: Self-directed learning in Snowflake, Databricks, Python-based validation, and Azure Data Factory—building practical cloud data validation skills to extend enterprise ETL expertise into modern data platforms.
